infotexts.entitydescription.remotetrigger: A detonator trigger of questionable quality and seemingly made of a repurposed RC car controller. It sends detonation codes up to 4 digits to activate field programmable detonators.
infotexts.entitydescription.remotedetonator: A supposedly "high quality", "military grade" multi-purpose detonator with some components taped to it and hastily soldered in. It can detonate via either ‖color:245,105,105,255‖proximity‖color:end‖ or ‖color:245,105,105,255‖a matching detonation code, instantly and without warning.‖color:end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.pager: Broadcasts anything you say to anyone with a pager coded to the same faction. Virtually everyone on europa carries a recieving pager.
infotexts.entitydescription.inquisitorrobes: A highly advanced combat uniform invented by the church of the husk. These robes ‖color:245,105,105,255‖actively camoflauge‖color:end‖ their wearer, ‖color:245,105,105,255‖aslong as they have a symbiotic husk infection‖color:end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.beltlight: Based on standard europan glowsticks, this light uses a dimmer filling to massively extend its lifetime, and there's some rigging to hook it onto a belt, though the rigging does make it too bulky to carry in large quantities.
infotexts.entitydescription.heal_gas_grenade: A modified europabrew grenade filled with Omnorizone, a potent stimulant and healing drug.
infotexts.entitydescription.riotshield: A heavy, armored, transparent shield. Stops projectiles and people.
infotexts.entitydescription.enforcer_suit_installe:
An autosurgeon alongside a selection of tools and parts. Automatically installs an Enforcer Exoskeleton into the user. ‖color:154,213,163,255‖Permits the use of Enforcer Exoskeletons.‖color:end‖ ‖color:243,162,50,255‖This device is a one-time use. While the exoskeleton can be removed, the implant cannot.‖color:end‖
‖color:255,0,0,255‖WARNING: Attempting to use this device while wearing backpacks, light tactical vests, toolbelts, or heavy weapons will cause the device to fail.‖color:end‖ ‖color:255,0,0,255‖If this occurs, please report to your commanding officer to have the device repacked.‖color:end‖
infotexts.entitydescription.enforcer_exoskeleton:
A modified service exoskeleton, conected to the user's musculoskeletal system with aid from implants. It has been augmented with a variety of new parts to allow it to carry heavy armor. ‖color:154,213,163,255‖Permits the use of Enforcer Armor.‖color:end‖
‖color:154,213,163,255‖Capable of mounting a riot shield alongside a weapon of choice. Incapable of mounting heavy weapons or explosive launchers.‖color:end‖
infotexts.afflictiondescription.enforcer_emp: The patient has had their exoskeleton EMPed, causing total loss of control over motor functions.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.enforcer_rigging: The patient has been augmented with a modified heavy exoskeleton, allowing them to use Enforcer armor.
infotexts.afflictiondescription.enforcer_implant: The patient has been augmented with a suite of implants allowing them to interface with an Enforcer Exoskeleton.
infotexts.afflictiondescription._weaponsway_perman: The patient has reduced control of their limb. It is unknown if, or when, this will end.
infotexts.afflictiondescription._weaponsway: The patient has reduced control of their limb. Full control should be regained in time.
